Hero.description: Maison isn't a salon — it's a ritual. World-class artists, hand-crafted services, and a quietly sumptuous atmosphere.

ServiceSelection.description: Every service is performed by internationally trained artists using eco-certified products. Combine multiple services in a single appointment.

Wizard.step1Description: You can combine multiple services in a single booking.

BookingCalendar.noSlots: No free slots on this day
BookingCalendar.noSlotsHint: Please pick a different day or master.
BookingCalendar.anyMasterDesc: We'll automatically suggest the soonest available master matching your services.

BookingSummary.title: All set.
BookingSummary.description: Review the details and confirm to lock in your appointment.
BookingSummary.termsPrefix: By tapping "Confirm" you agree to our
BookingSummary.errorConflict: That slot was just taken by another booking. Please pick a different time.
BookingSummary.errorOutsideHours: That time is outside the master's working hours.
BookingSummary.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Confirmed.description: Booking #{id} is now in our system. We sent the confirmation to your email and will remind you 24 hours before your appointment.

QPay.autoConfirm: Your booking will auto-confirm once payment lands. If nothing happens after 30 seconds, hit "Check payment" below.
QPay.bankInstruction: Tap a bank logo to open its app, or scan the QR code with any banking QR scanner.
QPay.footer: SSL secured · QPay merchant API · v2

Footer.tagline: High-touch service for guests who care — quiet, precise, considered.
Footer.newsletterDescription: Monthly editorial and quiet drops on new services.

BookPage.title: Choose your services
BookPage.description: Combine multiple services in a single appointment. Click "Continue" once you're done.
